## Phase Progress

- [ ] **MINE** — Raw ideas captured
- [ ] **SCOUT** — Research completed
- [ ] **ASSAY** — Options evaluated, spec drafted
- [ ] **CRUCIBLE** — Assumptions stress-tested
- [ ] **AUDITOR** — Quality check, confidence scored
- [ ] **PLAN** — Action plan created
- [ ] **VERIFY** — Decision documented
- [ ] **AUTORESEARCH** — Validated with real data
